# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[20:02]` **CREATE Medicines 在 MT-304 的 1/2 期研究中为第一位患者进行给药，MT-304 是一种针对 HER2 阳性实体瘤的一流多重免疫体内 CAR 疗法**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *CREATE Medicines Doses First Patient in Phase 1/2 Study of MT-304, a First-in-Class Multi-immune In Vivo CAR Therapy Targeting HER2-Positive Solid Tumors* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>

- `[12:57]` **全球首个！复旦团队先天性耳聋基因治疗临床突破：患者真正实现“享有自然听觉”** [🔗阅读原文](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMif0FVX3lxTE1qQnhGNVpIRUVHTUNNS3lXTFY1WWtpQzJEY1gzclh4cl9kR0REMDJTV0F6ODE1VDR0WklveEhXRjFkVVdQQWQtY2hILXhheUhBbnBsWEZhaXo2S1J1TnJJajgwTjdWbEpwMXg0MC1XRERRdTF4cUhJNG5TZElSSkk?oc=5)
